Meta.title: YHILYANTY — Squad / Arma Reforger Community
Meta.description: Ukrainian tactical clan. Squad. Arma Reforger. No toxic. Discipline, voice on comms, aimed fire.

Hero.title: We don't dodge. We hold the line.
Hero.subtitle: Tactical clan playing Squad and Arma Reforger. Ukrainian voice channel, real ops every night, zero toxicity, zero randoms in the lineup.

About.title: A community, not a random stack.
About.body: We came together to play tactical shooters seriously, but not joylessly. Ukrainian on comms, adult roster, clear chain of command, and respect for each other's time. No 14-year-olds screaming into the mic — adults only.
bullets: Voice channel: Ukrainian. Russian is fine, not punished, but the official language is Ukrainian.
Schedule: every night 19:00 to 23:00 Kyiv time. Weekends are raids.
Structure: Squad Lead, Fire Team Lead, Rifleman, Medic, Drone Op, Marksman.
Loud microphone and a working headset are mandatory. Push-to-talk.

Games.title: Two games. One approach.
Games.subtitle: Squad is the team's backbone, Arma Reforger covers large-scale 50+ player ops. We swap between them depending on mood and how many people are online.

squad.name: Squad
squad.body: 100-player tactical shooter. We play on our own servers and on UA / EU milsim servers. We specialize in objective defense and coordinated assaults.

arma.name: Arma Reforger
arma.body: Large operations with operational planning. Conflict, Game Master sessions, custom scenarios. Armor, air, artillery — all in one evening.

Gallery.title: The U mark.
Gallery.body: We don't throw the trident around. Our mark is a stylized 'У', two rifles crossed, a recon drone above, the banner below. Black, white, yellow — clan colors.

Merch.formIntro: Fill out the form — HQ will contact you in Discord to confirm payment and shipping.
Merch.successBody: HQ will contact you in Discord within 24 hours. Thanks for supporting the clan.

flag.title: Clan banner
flag.description: Polyester banner 90×60 cm with double-sided print. Black background, yellow 'У' mark, eyelets along the edge for mounting.

mug.title: Clan mug
mug.description: Ceramic mug 330 ml with sublimation print. Yellow 'У' on black glaze. Dishwasher-safe (hand wash recommended).

patches.title: Patches (set of 3)
patches.description: Set of three patches: 'У' mark, IFF marker, and text block. PVC with velcro backing, fade-resistant.

rules.title: Team over frags
rules.body: Cover your brother — you're a hero. Win the K/D but lose the push? Worthless.

rules.title: No toxicity
rules.body: One warning and a reminder. Second — kick. There is no third.

rules.title: Voice on comms
rules.body: No mic = no tactics. No tactics = no Squad.

rules.title: Ukrainian first
rules.body: We don't ban Russian, but the official language is Ukrainian. Especially commands.

JoinCta.title: Ready to take a position?
JoinCta.subtitle: Application goes through Discord. The intake bot is ours, the test interview is run by HQ.

Roster.title: Roster
Roster.subtitle: Current personnel. Synced with Discord roles.

Join.title: Apply now.
Join.subtitle: Four steps. No 50-question survey, no map trivia.

steps.title: Sign in with Discord
steps.body: Button below. We ask for your name, avatar, and your list of Discord servers. Nothing else. OAuth scope: identify.

steps.title: Join the server
steps.body: If you're not on the server yet, the button takes you there. Application can't proceed without it.

steps.title: Fill the brief
steps.body: Age, Squad / Arma experience, schedule, mic. No fields for unnecessary prose — write like radio.

steps.title: Trial op
steps.body: One evening with us in a custom match. We test the mic, command execution, coordination. Then a decision.

Join.loginNote: Discord OAuth is in scaffold mode — needs CLIENT_ID wired on the server side. The button will tell you where to configure.

Admin.title: Command post.
Admin.subtitle: HQ access only. Discord-ID is checked against OWNER_DISCORD_ID on the server.

locked.title: Access denied
locked.body: Sign in with Discord using an HQ account. If you are HQ and still see this — check that your Discord-ID matches OWNER_DISCORD_ID in the env config.

tiles.applicationsBody: New applications from the Join form. Approve / Reject / invite to trial op.
tiles.announcementsBody: Text announcements on the landing and in Discord #announcements.
tiles.operationsBody: Training and raid schedule. Syncs with Discord Events.
tiles.membersBody: Grant / revoke roles, sync callsigns with Discord nicknames.

preview.title: Preview — applications
preview.subtitle: Rendered from mock data. Real applications wire up once Discord-OAuth + Postgres are on.

content.title: Texts
content.body: Edit every label on the site in 3 languages. Changes apply instantly.

images.title: Images
images.body: Upload new photos — old ones get replaced in the gallery and detail pages.

layout.title: Landing sections
layout.body: Reorder or hide whole blocks of the landing page.

pages.title: Pages
pages.body: Create and edit your own pages. Text, images, gallery, CTA buttons.

nav.title: Navbar & footer
nav.body: Add, rename, reorder or hide menu items at the top and bottom of the site.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.body: Ask how to do something on the site or get ready-made copy written.

orders.title: Merch orders
orders.body: Review shop orders and mark them done.

team.title: Team
team.body: Hand out positions: admins and editors can help run the site.

system.title: System
system.body: Full site backup, restore and the team action log.

media.title: Media library
media.body: Upload photos, GIFs and video. Copy a link and paste it anywhere.

merch.title: Merch products
merch.body: Add and edit products: price, description, sizes, photo/gif/video.

Admin.liveEditHint: Tip: open the site and hit “Edit site” at the bottom right — you can change any text or photo right on the page and create new pages with one button.

BotPromo.title: The clan bot.
BotPromo.body: In-house Discord bot for video work: GIFs from screencasts, multi-line captions, an in-chat editor with timeline and live preview — all without leaving Discord.

Bot.title: yhilbot.
Bot.subtitle: Discord bot for video and screencasts. GIFs, captions, timeline editor — right inside chat, no external editors needed.

commands.summary: Convert video to GIF with quality and size control
commands.detail: Crop, resize, palette via PSR. FFmpeg under the hood.

commands.summary: Add a meme-style caption to a video or GIF
commands.detail: Multi-line text, font and color presets. Safe input escaping.

commands.summary: Interactive video editor: trim, text, blur, split
commands.detail: Graphical timeline, live preview, undo/redo, persistent sessions.
CPU/RAM, render queue, active sessions, lifetime counters.

commands.summary: Help on commands and the system

features: Timeline editor with live preview directly in Discord
Render semaphore so parallel renders don't murder the CPU
Render cache invalidated by cursor edits

Footer.rights: All rights to the trident. Use of the 'У' mark — only with HQ permission.

Editor.title: Web editor
Editor.botWillSendBack: Bot will deliver the result back to Discord automatically.
